title: 500 TidyZ Dog Poo Bags. Made from 100% Recycled Plastic. Extra Strong, 30 × 36 cm Extra Large Pet Waste Bags. Tie Handles. On a Roll. Unscented. Leakproof. 10 rolls of 50
features: Made from 100% Recycled Plastic - Arguably THE BEST Choice For Our Environment
Leak Proof, Extra Strong Doggy Bags – Extra Thick So You Never Need To Double‑Bag! Ideal for Large Breeds.
Extra Large 30 × 36 cm Pet Waste Bags – Ideal for all Pet Waste needs with Easy Tie Handles for Quick, Hygienic Disposal of cat litter, rabbit droppings etc.
10 Individual Rolls, Each With 50 Extra Large, Extra-Strong Bags Made with 100% Recycled Content Reliable & Suitable For Even The LARGEST Breeds!
Eco Aware Packaging – Recyclable Box & Label With No Cardboard Cores
Perforated - 50 Extra Large, Extra Strong Bags Per Roll With Perforations For Easy Dispensing
Extra Large & Extra Strong Bags For Your Peace Of Mind and to Ensure Safe and Competent Waste Collection!
TidyZ - A Trusted Household Name - Supplying Pet Waste Bags To Pet Owners Since 1969
The ONLY choice for Safe, Secure & Reliable Pet Waste Pick Up!
description: Product Description The Ultimate Dog Walking Essential Keep every walk clean, easy, and stress free with TidyZ Extra Strong Doggy Bags , the perfect companion for responsible pet owners who value convenience, reliability, and eco-friendliness . Thoughtfully designed with extra strength and durability , these bags ensure you never have to worry about leaks or tears, even when handling messes from larger dogs. Made from 100% recycled plastic , they’re not only tough but also eco-conscious, helping you care for the planet while caring for your pet. Their generous size provides ample room, while the easy-tie handles make sealing and disposal quick, hygienic, and hassle-free. Made from 100% Recycled Plastic Eco-Friendly & responsible. Help reduce waste and protect the planet by diverting plastic waste from landfills and oceans. Fully recyclable packaging. Can be disposed of responsibly Unused bags are fully recyclable. Strength & Leak-Proof Protection Extra-strong & double-thick. Prevents rips, tears, and unpleasant surprises. 100% leak-proof! Keeps hands clean and mess securely contained. Extra-large capacity! Easily handles waste from dogs of all sizes. Convenience & Easy Handling Easy-tie handles for quick, secure closure, and hassle-free disposal in public or household general waste. Great value bulk pack. Perfect for keeping a roll by the door, in the car, in the garden shed, or in your walking bag. Generous supply: 500 bags (10 rolls of 50) keeping you stocked for months. On a Roll & Easy-Tear Design Convenient roll format for effortless dispensing and consistent supply – you know you have enough with you so won’t get caught out! Pre-perforated effortless dispensing and fast, individual, bag removal. Unlike loose bags that can scatter or blow away, they stay where you want them - until you need them! Walk with confidence! Keep every outing clean, hygienic and stress-free.
